summary: Employee Edit HR Feature - All tests PASSED. Backend: 16/16 tests passed for PUT /employees/{id}/basic and PUT /employees/{id} endpoints. Frontend: All UI features working correctly - VIEW mode with pay info bar, EDIT mode with full form, auto-calculation of daily/hourly rates, formula display, Save/Cancel, and all tabs (Calendar, Projects, Attendance, Payroll).
critical_code_review_comments: Auto-calculation formula in updatePayField function correctly calculates: daily = monthly/days, hourly = daily/hours
Auto-calculated fields properly disabled and show (авто) label with green color
Formula text displays correctly: 'X EUR / 22 дни = Y EUR/ден → Y / 8ч = Z EUR/ч'
All data-testids implemented correctly for robust testing
seed_data_creation: None needed - used existing tech1 employee
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee edit feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints PUT /employees/{id}/basic (phone, name) and PUT /employees/{id} (pay settings) working correctly. Frontend has VIEW mode with pay info bar showing phone, type, monthly EUR, daily EUR, hourly EUR/ч, hours/day, days/month. EDIT mode has full form with auto-calculation for Monthly pay type.

Backend: PUT /api/employees/{id} updates.notes: Updates pay_type, monthly_salary, daily_rate, hourly_rate, working_days_per_month, standard_hours_per_day, active

Frontend: Employee detail opens in VIEW.notes: Pay info bar visible with all fields: Тел, Тип, Месечна EUR, Дневна EUR, Часова EUR/ч, Часове/ден, Дни/мес

Frontend: Edit button opens EDIT mode wi.notes: Редактиране button toggles to edit form with all input fields

Frontend: Auto-calculation works for Mon.notes: 3300 EUR -> daily=150 EUR, hourly=18.75 EUR/ч (correct calculation)

Frontend: Auto-calculated fields show (а.notes: Labels show '(авто)' and values displayed in emerald/green color

Frontend: Formula text visible.notes: Shows 'X EUR / 22 дни = Y EUR/ден → Y / 8ч = Z EUR/ч' with green values

Frontend: Save persists changes.notes: Phone number updated and displayed correctly after save

Frontend: Cancel reverts to original.notes: Cancel button returns to VIEW mode without saving changes

Frontend: Calendar tab works.notes: Calendar view loads with month navigation

Frontend: Projects tab works.notes: Projects table displays employee project history

Frontend: Attendance tab works.notes: Attendance table displays recent attendance records

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints using real backend
